## Acceptance evidence

- [ ] Every acceptance criterion in the linked issue is complete.
- [ ] Regression tests named in the linked issue were added or updated.
- [ ] Security, persistence, archive, worker, and cleanup invariants were reviewed where applicable.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `docs/architecture.md` and `docs/ROADMAP.md` were updated when behavior or status changed.
